reviews.review_text: The bed in the cabin was awful. I ended up in so much pain from it and had to leave a night early.  Very basic which was what we were expecting. Nice walk to the beach. Say pet friendly but then warn you can’t go on the furniture when you turn up. Would have liked some bit of storage to put bags as we couldn’t use the couch as a result.

I write this while I lie awake at 12:30am unable to sleep due to rats running all over floors of cabin. I have stayed in several dog friendly cabins and this one takes the cake. It started when I checked in with animals in roof and then when I turned off lights to go to bed the scurrying on the floors began. I have since turned lights on and they don’t care. Dog is too scared to get on floor I am too scared as it is under bed currently. This isn’t even really a caravan park as all people except this 1 cabin live here and have lived here for many many many years. The mattress is like a water bed so unless you have really good core strength good luck. You sink right in to it, it has no firmness at all. Was supposed to stay 2 nights will be staying one have to cancel work meetings and very unsafely drive 4 hours home with no sleep.

What a great little park, everyone is so friendly, Theresa in the office was just fantastic,  nothing was too much trouble, always a friendly smile, and also Dave the groundsman. The amenities are very clean . Will definitely recommend this park we will be back.  Thanks guys
Nice clean room. Quiet location
Lovely place. Will always stay here from now on. Enjoyed our stay. Thankyou to the management and cleaning staff for your professional services and clean cabin

We stayed at Tasman Holiday Parks at Torquay for 4 Nights- Not Impressed !! Joining Unit had Fire Alarms going off at 4am ?? Power Points Dodgy?? Lost Power at 5:30 pm 😕 Rang Emergency no ohh - She is getting Groceries 40 minutes away ?? My husband found Power box & reset Throw out Power switch - Wasn't advised where this was ??? Really need a Refund at least

Super clean and well appointed cabins. Bed was really comfy! Excellent service. Great location.
Would recommend for a small family 😃 safe location, nice and quiet. Very good price too
Nice friendly check in, very tidy and well maintained.

Very quiet and clean accommodation. It felt secure and relaxed. Not packed like some. You have space . The pool is perfect and cool. Amenities spacious and clean. Would highly recommend and go back. The beach is four streets away
Nice quiet place to stay good clean cabins
Cosy clean cabin with own bathroom amenities. Private patio with dog screen. Short walks to dog accessible beach.

We have stayed in this park many times over the Christmas period with many family and friends. This was the first time we have been extremely disappointed in the presentation of the park. Our site was full of prickles had not been mowed on arrival and didn't get mowed the whole 2 weeks we were there. Bins nor amenities cleaned nor emptied over the Christmas period even thoe we were charged a higher rate on public holidays we had no service.  We totally understand that there is always a higher rate over the Christmas period however when your staying in a caravan and the only thing your using in electricity you don't expect to be charged like your staying in the Taj Mahal. The cleaning staff and yardman's were extremely friendly and apologised for any inconvenience that was caused. When telling an office staff member of our issues we were told that the manager would call us when she returned on Sunday however we never received a call. We were not the only people unhappy with their stay this year as everyone in the park was unhappy with conditions as well.

Upon arrival the parking area for cabin 12 had a sprinkler going which made it muddy and was covered in chicken poo, shoes ended up covered in it. The cabin is old and dated needs refurbishing. The WI-FI also did not work. The room had a number mosquitoes and cockroaches even though we kept the room closed with air conditioner on as it was hot when we were there. Definitely overpriced at $250. Noticed all the other cabins looked newer so I don’t think all the same.
The guy in reception was so nice and helpful, comfortable bed, and beautiful place to stay , our dog love this place
I live there now
Very short 2 night stay. Receptionist was lovely and very helpful. Dogs are very welcome. Location is very handy to the bay. Cabin room was perfectly adequate and spotlessly clean.

Had an amazing stay with my puppy dog! All the staff were so lovely! I even got a welcome pack of treats for my dog which I thought was awesome!

Close location to the beach and shops with many amazing foods and dog on leash area right down the road about a 4 minute walk away.

The staff were always so friendly to me and my puppy and the place was very clean and relaxing and also quiet!!

I would 100 percent recommend to stay at this beautiful place and I will be definitely coming back.

Thank you so much for the amazing stay I had a great time.
Fantastic Park staff are are amazing and very accomodating Here for 3 weeks😊

we had the best couple of days here
very dog friendly and very welcoming staff
we had our granddaughter with us that wasn't booked in but it was no issue at all
they even made a bed up for her.
The location was great!
Beautiful Park, short stroll to beach shops lots of activities for kids, safe & secure
Lovely park and people

From the first email "looking forward to meeting you" to the end our stay was fantastic. Every effort was made to ensure it stay was amazing.
Due to work commitments I had to reschedule. No problem
Correspondence including sending directions and safe trip wishes.
Cabin was perfect, loved the tranquillity of the park, was also really tidy.
Staff exceptionally pleasant, happy n helpful
Would highly recommend and definitely looking forward to going back again.

Person that was guiding us was kind saw and he showed as where were to go as the sink hole destroyed our original place and we were looking for wifi and there didn’t have it even thou the paper said there did and the floor boards weren’t clipped in properly as there is gaps in the floor and one of the floor boards could collapse due to it being wet due to cyclone and bath room door didn’t have a stopper which makes it hard to put back up when it’s down and really hard to get out of you are in there we are number 12 and the shower keeps going hot cold hot cold which is annoying did leave dog bags and treats

Terrible place and terrible people. Literally the minute we pulled up the woman next to us told the manager I had a Staffy. The manager came instantly to remind me of the pet rules and offered for us to leave the park.  The manager never even saw my dogs. The electricity wasn’t working from their power pole so I asked him to have a look, our Staffy was inside our motor home with the screen door shut and the manager demanded I “secure the dog” inside before he would walk past the door like my dog would burst through the door and attack him. This was our first five minutes at this place. Every hour after for the entire stay a staff member would walk past our camp site and stop to look in and see if our dogs were locked up. They say they’re pet friendly but only if you have a little Maltese and similar. Arrogant and judgemental people. Ps: my Staffy Leon is a teddy bear who is scared of cats, storms, sliding chairs and feathers.

Clean, tidy and comfy. Only negatives is that the walls are paper thin and can hear neighbours every footstep, toilet flush and kids jumping and banging while trying to sleep. The wifi on the smart tv also doesn’t work. Other than that it’s nice.
Parque de caravanas con mini casas de alquiler. Muy limpio , muy bien equipado con cocina , frigorífico y menaje. Terraza delante de la casa. A 10 min de la playa a pie
Friendly staff, fantastic BBQ facilities including fridge, some cooking/dining equipment, the pool was decent beds were very comfortable and it's so close to the beach and esplanade!

We recently stayed at this park for 3 weeks.
It was a very relaxing and pleasant stay.  The park is ideally located 300m from The Esplanade and Torquay with its shops and cafes.
The grounds are lovely with lots of palm trees and being a small park you feel like you are staying in a beautiful garden setting.
The team there are all so friendly and efficient- nothing was ever a problem.  We were always greeted with a smile and hello from everyone.
The camp kitchen is excellent with a lovely sheltered open air setting.  The amenities are old school but very bright and spotless - no complaints.
Thank you for another great stay. Really appreciated.

Loved our stay at Tasman holiday park Torquay.
The room was great, staff friendly and it being a pet friendly cabin was just perfect for what we wanted.
My dog Zirra even got a take home treat bag!
Good facilities. Staff were helpful. Location was good for what we were looking for.

The park is very well located, small and quiet, which was lovely. |We were in cabin 7, which is directly next to the toilet block so a striplight shines into the bottom of the blind over the double bed all night. This stopped us sleeping on the first night so the lovely lady in reception did all she could to help. We needed up taping the blind to the window frame! Which worked until it came unstuck!|Overall the cabin was spotlessly clean and had everything we needed for a short stay. There are enough beds for a family of 4 but a tiny table with two chairs both inside and outside - making it tricky for 4 people to eat. There is also a bit of a lack of storage to unpack into or onto. The bathroom for example is a good size and the shower was great, however there are no shelves or anywhere to put a wash bag. |Overall it’s a nice quiet place to stay and the lady at reception was absolutely wonderful. She not only did her very best to sort our issue with the light she managed to stop my overtired kids from fighting and get them both to help!
Great place,  very comfy cabins close to the shops and waterfront
Lovely cabins to stay overnight very clean 2 bed cabin highly recommend
Everything was perfect. Clean, Spacious, Close to beach, fit in budget. Really enjoyed my stay.
Great place to stay. The cabin was comfortable, affordable and very clean. Staff very pleasant and very accommodating.  Quiet place to stay. Will stay again.

Manager is an absolute idiot! Comes out throughout the day and makes random rules up!
Never staying again!

Reply - In regard to your reply, it was a family reunion, and everyone was behaved, we had a sick family member there! hence the reunion. The person you so called removed was actually staying there as a paying guest! your caretaker was being so disrespectful, and this is the reason this person was talking to him!

Anyway, I can tell now that you won't accept that Tasman Holiday Park are in the wrong!

Very Quiet. -  Just like Staying at a Boarding School / Don't make a noise - DONT have any fun!! This is not a park for visitors. Rude Manager! False accusations against guests.
RULES: No one from outside the caravan park is allowed in after 8pm!  YES - That's the rules!!  And apparently, according to the manager, everybody signs to agree to it and he'll get the police if you breach the rules!! At 9pm the manager does rounds to tell you to get ready for shutting down everything and being inside your own van or unit by 10pm. At 9.55pm he's there again telling you, you're not allowed to entertain or be outside your accomodation after 10...
Had a family get together in this caravan park. We were the majority of the guests in the park. 7 sites/cabins between us all. Other family had 3 other sites booked at another park. Thought it was great here because there was a community area in this park where we could get together and sit and talk etc.... Ages of family ranged from 30 to 92. Friday night and Saturday night same thing.  Family all community eating and talking / playing cards. No music! No partying! No real drinking - just a few beers and a good time. But it's not allowed in this caravan park! Anyone not staying here is not allowed after 8pm. At 9pm you have to start quietening things down. At 10pm everyone has to be in their own accomodation. If you begin to dispute or debate the rules you get accused of being intoxicated - despite that fact you couldn't possibly be. You're just angry that family have driven from 4 to 10 hours to get to this place to spend your time together only to be treated like school kids in a boarding house!  Don't dare question the headmaster!!  He's boss here and he knows every guest who is booked in - despite the fact he's trying to order out someone who actually was a guest there for 3 days.
And don't question him or tell him how archaic his rules are or you'll be accused of being intoxicated. We wonder where he gets his qualifications to make those accusations.... he should be more careful! Anyhow, after 2 days, we found a much friendlier reception in the other caravan park where the other family members were staying and at least got to spend Sunday and Monday there where human beings run the park and enjoy seeing families who might only see one another once a year get together. Just wasted 2 days earlier at this camp! If you are looking at a caravan park where everyone is almost not seen and everyone will definitely be in bed with the lights out each night before 10 and you don't want visitors from outside the park - then this may be for you and is how it should be promoted!
IF YOU WANT A GOOD TIME SOCIALLY and WANT SOME FUN WITH GUESTS NOT IN YOUR VAN OR CABIN - DO NOT STAY HERE!!
And by the way, the floor of our cabin was dirty from when we entered and the shower waste blocks so that it fills the base...
The floor of the cabin constantly felt gritty and dirty!
This was a good experience. Unfortunately it is well booked and hard to go back to especially in peak times.

Really nice cabin, although the air con vibrated the wall behind the bed meaning you could hear and feel it all night. Again, as per ALL Tasman HPs (and I’ve stayed in many across NZ and Oz) there is no reliable WiFi, even if you can connect to it it’s incredibly slow and not fit for purpose. I find it very strange in 2024 that they don’t seem to care (I’ve asked), and they all know it’s a problem. It wouldn’t cost much to upgrade the infrastructure. If they fixed this issue I’d give Tasman HPs five full stars every time!
Walking distance to the beach and the water front restaurants. Fully equipped kitchen, nice villas.

What a beautiful well kept, clean and inviting park.
Staff were amazing, facilities were spotless, very very well managed!! Highly recommend!

We had a fabulous stay to start our camper van journey off up the east coast. The receptionist could not be more helpful if she tried. We had a very warm welcome and nothing was too much to ask. The pool was we excellent, clean and quiet.. Location was good, an enjoyable longer walk to Urangan or a short drive. Would reccomend staying!
Lovely  quite park not far from beach and walk to food option good camp kitchen and laundry  nice pool. Will come again.

The friendliest caravan park that we have stayed in for a long time; beautiful gardens extremely clean amenities and the camp kitchen was spotless. We were put on site 8 it was close to everything the pool is also lovely we extended our stay fro 4 nights to 9
Great pet friendly accomodation and great location. Thank you

The place definitely worth. Great kitchen, clean toilets, good and quiet location. BUT the WiFi is a big NO. Doesn't work at all. If you depend on Wifi, do not recommend this place. If not, is a big yes. Nice staff.

We stayed here last minute on our way back from Fraser. Can not recommend more highly! The manager was so lovely and provided fantastic advice on where to eat with our family. Our cabin was VERY clean and the set up for our family of 5 was perfect! We will most certainly be back!

We had a wonderful time staying in our caravan with our doggy. The amenities block was super clean, the camp kitchen was the best ever and the doggy welcoming pack was super cute. The staff were lovely and friendly. We will definitely be back next year.

This place was so to us as a small caravan park with only 22 sites. They didn't mention that 3/4 of this park was permanents that had "happy hour" and meetings in the nearby kitchen! Not to mention that we were warned by numerous locals (here) about the theft in the area!

This is one of the loveliest parks we've ever stayed in. Very private and quiet. The caretakers were lovely and helpful. The amenities, although a little old were exceptionally clean. Same with the camp kitchen which is well equipped. Highly recommended. Will definitely stay here again.
Very wonderful experience. Very clean. Friendly service. Very great staff.
Can not recommend highly enough for a great economical holiday, pet friendly and just generally friendly community within the venue. Lisa was above and beyond helpful
